name: Zucchini in Dill Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon low sodium instant chicken bouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the julienned zucchini, chopped onion, water, chicken bouillon, and dill weed.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Add melted margarine, sugar, and lemon juice; stir until combined.
4. Remove from heat and do not drain excess liquid.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour and sour cream.
6. Stir in half of the flour and sour cream mixture into the hot zucchini sauce.
7. Return to heat and add the remaining flour and sour cream mixture.
8. Cook until thickened. Yield: 8 servings.
